title: Phase 0: Rollout plan, test strategy, and exception model docs
description: Create ROLLOUT-PLAN.md with phased deployment strategy. Create TEST-STRATEGY.md with testing approach per layer. Create EXCEPTION-MODEL.md with exception categories, severity levels, queues, and SLAs.
steps: Write docs/ROLLOUT-PLAN.md with phased rollout strategy (branch-by-branch, module-by-module)
Write docs/TEST-STRATEGY.md with testing pyramid (unit, integration, e2e, workflow tests)
Write docs/EXCEPTION-MODEL.md with exception categories by module
Define severity levels, escalation paths, SLA timers, and auto-assignment rules
